what_was_done: DNS seeder via Cloudflare API, released v2.0.4+v2.0.5, TORUSd in release workflow, UPnP enabled for daemon, UPnP retry fix, 2nd seed node added, Tor v3 plan written, branch tor_v3 created
known_issues: StakeMiner requires vNodes.size() >= 3 (miner.cpp:542) - only 2 reachable subnets currently
MAX_MONEY set to 200M - needs hard-fork bump before ~2034
Home wallets behind NAT not reachable - UPnP not working on most routers
Gate 3 blocks git push from Claude - user must push manually
Qt wallet Unix binary has missing shared libs (libssl 1.1, libboost 1.71) - needs static linking
next_steps: Track A: Deploy 3-4 TORUSd on different VPS subnets to reach 3+ connections for staking
Track B: Implement Tor v3 (8 tasks, ~12 days) on branch tor_v3 - plan at docs/plans/tor-v3-impl.md
Push UPnP retry fix (commit 230a616 on main, not yet pushed)
Consider lowering vNodes.size() < 3 requirement for small networks
Add static linking to Dockerfile for portable Unix binary

releases.v2.0.5: UPnP default for daemon, 2nd seed node, TORUSd binary in release
releases.v2.0.4: DNS seeder + seed hostnames, seeder binary removed from repo
